=== c3p completions bash (head + tail) ===
# c3p bash completion (generated by `c3p completions bash`)
# Install: source <(c3p completions bash)
#      or: c3p completions bash > /etc/bash_completion.d/c3p
_c3p() {
  local cur prev words cword
  COMPREPLY=()
  cur="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
  prev="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD-1]}"
...

  # Default: complete global flags.
  COMPREPLY=( $(compgen -W "--json --quiet -q --cwd --on-drift --wait --no-color --help -h --version -V" -- "${cur}") )
}
complete -F _c3p c3p

=== c3p completions zsh (head + tail) ===
#compdef c3p
# c3p zsh completion (generated by `c3p completions zsh`)
# Install: c3p completions zsh > "${fpath[1]}/_c3p"
#      or: source <(c3p completions zsh)
_c3p() {
...
      esac
      ;;
  esac
}
compdef _c3p c3p

=== c3p completions fish (head + sample) ===
# c3p fish completion (generated by `c3p completions fish`)
# Install: c3p completions fish > ~/.config/fish/completions/c3p.fish

function __c3p_profiles
  if test -d .claude-profiles
    find .claude-profiles -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -not -name '.*' 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.claude-profiles/||'
  end
end

# Verbs (only suggested when no verb has been given yet).
...
complete -c c3p -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a 'init'
complete -c c3p -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a 'list'
complete -c c3p -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a 'use'
complete -c c3p -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a 'status'
complete -c c3p -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a 'drift'

=== negative grep: standalone claude-profiles in any completion script (must be 0) ===
bash: 0
zsh: 0
fish: 0

=== c3p hook uninstall ===
[ok] Removed pre-commit hook
  /private/var/folders/_z/mrnvcw_j25746h9mwn9rqv8r0000gn/T/tmp.b4oSI2MIik/.git/hooks/pre-commit

=== pre-commit hook removed ===
ls: .git/hooks/pre-commit: No such file or directory
exit=1

=== c3p hook install ===
[ok] Installed pre-commit hook
  /private/var/folders/_z/mrnvcw_j25746h9mwn9rqv8r0000gn/T/tmp.b4oSI2MIik/.git/hooks/pre-commit

=== pre-commit hook reinstalled and matches canonical ===
#!/bin/sh
command -v c3p >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0
c3p drift --pre-commit-warn 2>&1
exit 0
